steps.title: Write the total earnings
steps.content:
Alicia earns regular pay for the first $8$ hours and overtime for the remaining $2$ hours. The total pay is
$$
8p+2(1.5p)
$$
This equals $156.75$.

steps.title: Solve for the hourly wage
steps.content: Combine the pay terms and solve: $$ 8p+2(1.5p)=156.75 $$ $$ 11p=156.75 $$ $$ p=14.25 $$ The answer is B.
